title: Section 7D
content: 1[7D. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate proceeding.-- No act or proceeding of 1***, the Board or of any advisory panel shall be deemed to be invalid by reason only of a vacancy in, or any defect in, the constitution of 1*** the Board or panel, as the case may be.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-6-1983). 2. The words “the Tribunal” omitted by Act 33 of 2021, s. 9 (w.e.f. 4-4-2021).
